channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Invited talk: Key: A Knowledge Engineering Harness by Fran�ois Scharffe
item.description: Date: Wednesday, July 8, 2026, at 3:30 PM. Where: Winslow Building, Room 1140. Tetherless World Constellation will be hosting Fran�ois Scharffe this week for an invited talk. Fran�ois is a hands-on enterprise knowledge architect and semantic AI leader. His career spans enterprise engineering, data and AI strategy consulting, product leadership, research, and community building. Fran�ois is a founder of the Knowledge Graph Conference, a leading forum for knowledge-centric AI technologies.
item.author: Community

item.title: Need a Professional Headshot? MMS can help!
item.description:
Multimedia Services provides free professional headshots to faculty and staff; this service is provided once a month. The next date is Wednesday July 22, 2026! Please use the Photography Request Form to book your appointment now! https://dotcio.rpi.edu/services/audio-video-and-photography/photography-and-portraits

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
